privileged_info_summary: The task involves cleaning up synthetic duplicate records in Jolly Lobby Track. The target employee is 'Sarah Jones', with one record containing the email 's.jones@example.com' and the other containing the phone '555-0199'. The agent must consolidate these into a single record containing both fields and save a confirmation screenshot at '/home/ga/consolidated_host_result.png'. The application database is typically stored as an .mdb file in the Lobby Track directory.
